attributes.description: Alerts when a `db.server.top_query` delta total_exec_time exceeds 10 s. Top queries consuming disproportionate time.
attributes.name: [PostgreSQL OTel] Slow top queries

investigation_guide.blob:
## PostgreSQL slow top queries

### What fired
`attributes.postgresql.total_exec_time > 10000 ms` delta per scrape on a top query.

### Why it matters
Top queries from pg_stat_statements dominate total workload. A query consuming 10+ seconds per scrape interval is a prime optimisation target.

### Triage
1. Inspect the query text and plan.
2. Check for missing indexes / poor stats.

### Remediation
- Optimise the query.
- Consider query rewrite or index changes.

### Tuning
- 10 s threshold; tune to scrape cadence.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM logs-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*
// Top query stats from pg_stat_statements; total_exec_time is delta per scrape
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query"
| WHERE attributes.postgresql.total_exec_time IS NOT NULL AND attributes.postgresql.total_exec_time > 0
// Threshold: total exec time > 10 seconds in window (delta); tune for scrape interval
| WHERE attributes.postgresql.total_exec_time > 10000
| KEEP service.instance.id, attributes.db.namespace, attributes.db.query.text, attributes.postgresql.total_exec_time, attributes.postgresql.calls
| SORT attributes.postgresql.total_exec_time DESC
| LIMIT 20
